description:
1. Smartphone charger
2. Power input：DC 5V/800mA 
3. Max Capacity：50kg/110 Pounds
4. Power output：DC 5V/1000mAh 
5. Unit：kg lb oz g
6. Battery Capacity：2600mAh 
7. Torch brightness：60Lumens
8. Charging time：4~5h

9. Flashlight : 60 Lumen Led light

10. Size:153*35*38mm
11. Weight：167g


It has two options, with USB cable and without USB cable

The  USB cable is same as the Android mobile phone.


Content

1 Multi-function luggage scale, with Power Bank and Led light
1 Micro USB cable
1 User Manual
